MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PATRICK AMESTOY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication is continued to August 18, 2014 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 8, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).
